## Accept cross-border payments with a single QR code

Your partners' international visitors can now pay in their home currency.

- **Tourist scans QR** — using Alipay, WeChat Pay, UPI, etc.
- **Automatic conversion** — real-time FX at competitive rates
- **Instant settlement** — funds in your local currency within 1 day

---

> "We saw a 40% increase in tourist spending." — Marina Bay Sands
